field_values.action_summary: A grand triumphal procession enters Helium. John Carter and Tars Tarkas are honored by Jeddak Tardos Mors, marking the historic unification of the Red and Green races.
field_values.camera_intent: Slow-motion tracking shots of the procession; Wide shots of the architecture and crowds; Close-ups of the formal exchange between Tardos Mors; Carter; and Tars Tarkas.

# Scene Contract: CH026_SC004

- chapter_id: `CH026`

## Production Intent

To formalize the political alliance and provide emotional resolution.

## Storyboard

A grand triumphal procession enters Helium. John Carter and Tars Tarkas are honored by Jeddak Tardos Mors, marking the historic unification of the Red and Green races.
